name: Jiangsu Sainty Corp., Ltd.
summary: Jiangsu Sainty Corp., Ltd. primarily engages in the import and export of textiles and garments in the People's Republic of China and internationally. The company offers woven garments, including wind resistant coats and jackets under the J. Crew, Ralph Lauren, Levis, Marina Yachting, 18CRR81, and other brands; casual and fashion apparel; lifestyle apparel, such as suits, outwear, bottoms, shirts, dress, T-shirts, sweaters, etc.; and casual and formal ladies' and men's' wear. It also imports, purchases, and sells chemical products, MCC products, metal materials, etc.; fashion clothes, special tooling products, casual clothes, shirts, children's clothes, and uniforms; clothing products, clothing accessories, electronic machine products, plastic particles, wood products, etc.; and pharmaceutical chemicals, textiles, and daily necessities, as well as operates flagship stores on various e-commerce platforms, as well as its own platform under the ESAINTY name. In addition, the company imports and exports garments, auto parts, chemical products, light industrial products, and electronic hardware and building materials; and manufactures, exports, and imports various suits and casual wear under the Jiangsu Famous brand. Further, it offers beer under the Budweiser & Heineken brands; rice wine under the Wuliangye, 1573, and Yanghe Blue Classic brands; table wine under the Changyu & Great Wall brands; and French wine under the Chemin Des Papes, as well as Rical imported wine. Additionally, it produces and exports female clothes and business suits; and wind resistant coats and jackets, as well as stores various liquid chemical products, such as phenol, 1,4√Ç¬ñbutanediol, ethylene glycol, diethylene glycol, styrene, toluene, xylene, methanol, and o-xylene. The company was founded in 1979 and is based in Nanjing, the People's Republic of China.
